creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jimmi, I've noticed this for, well, years.  You probably know it too.  Racket builds during the "stage" phase.  By definition, the building should be complete before stage starts.  Stage only does installation.

I'm guessing the actual vendor makefile is doing something wrong.  Can it be patched to split the target so building is done in "build" phase and the installation in "stage" phase?

It's not the only port that violates this, but they should all be fixed.  Racket is particularly obvious because it spends 1-2 hours in stage phase.
